title: Behavioral activation

steps.title: Current energy
steps.body: Rate your current energy from 1 to 10.

steps.title: Avoided activity
steps.body: Name one activity you have been avoiding or missing.

steps.title: Value connection
steps.body: What value would this action support?

steps.title: Five-minute version
steps.body: Shrink it to the smallest version that could count.

completionPrompt: Mark the plan complete when you try the smallest version.
